sections.paragraph:
Original: כּסף

Transliteration: kâsaph

Phonetic: kaw-saf'

BDB Definition:

  1. to long for, yearn for, long after
    1. (Qal) to long for
    2. (Niphal)
      1. to long for (deeply)
      2. being longed for (participle)

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1015

Part(s) of speech: Verb par
